item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response wakes up to the repeated downstream split pattern, explicitly names the prior exchange/points/presale reroutes, and rejects adding a new permanent gift handling port as the default. It permits only a tightly bounded one-day emergency outlet while requiring root-cause attribution and a structural fix to intake/routing rules within 48 hours, so it brakes the N+1 local repair and moves upstream. No fail signal of simply opening another channel is present."}
